items.q: Which movie features the character Detective Somerset?
items.explanation: Detective Somerset is associated with Se7en.

items.q: The character Andy Dufresne appears in The Shawshank Redemption.
items.explanation: Andy Dufresne is a key character in The Shawshank Redemption.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the movie There Will Be Blood?
items.explanation: Daniel Plainview is one of the defining characters in There Will Be Blood.

items.q: Name the movie that features the character Mia Dolan.
items.explanation: Mia Dolan is strongly linked to La La Land.

items.q: Name the movie that features the character Leonard Shelby.
items.explanation: Leonard Shelby is strongly linked to Memento.

items.q: Name the movie that features the character K.
items.explanation: K is strongly linked to Blade Runner 2049.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the movie Interstellar?
items.explanation: Cooper is one of the defining characters in Interstellar.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the movie Spirited Away?
items.explanation: Chihiro is one of the defining characters in Spirited Away.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the movie Fight Club?
items.explanation: Tyler Durden is one of the defining characters in Fight Club.

items.q: The character Django appears in The Social Network.
items.explanation: Django appears in Django Unchained, not The Social Network.
